permitted_conclusion: The current study preserves original diagnostic context but does not re-establish thresholds.
missing_evidence: Assay-specific threshold recovery, calibration and prospective consecutive recruitment
claim_boundary: Do not describe as newly validated baseline diagnostic performance.

permitted_conclusion: Within-patient score stability or drift can be quantified at T24.
missing_evidence: Interpretation bands and prospective clinical anchors
claim_boundary: Sampling time must be stated with every score.

permitted_conclusion: Within-patient drift and cohort heterogeneity can be quantified at T48.
missing_evidence: Prospective handling of informative dropout and interpretation bands
claim_boundary: T48 evidence is more vulnerable to dropout and recovery-state selection.

permitted_conclusion: Some score changes may track prespecified pathway changes.
missing_evidence: Replicated synchronous clinical anchor, assay repeatability and prespecified response criterion
claim_boundary: Do not use pathway coupling as proof of treatment responsiveness.

permitted_conclusion: Fixed outcome labels can describe cohort composition.
missing_evidence: Prospective prediction model, calibration and independent validation
claim_boundary: No mortality association is interpreted as prognostic validation.

missing_evidence: Impact study, explicit action threshold, benefit-harm analysis and external validation
